title: Validate CAS races, crash recovery, and multi-worktree convergence under the split pipeline
summary: Prove that the thinner authoritative mutation path still converges correctly under compare-and-swap conflicts, writer races, daemon restarts, background lag, and competing worktrees that observe different shared-ref heads at different times.

acceptance.label: Concurrent disjoint and overlapping writers converge without losing authoritative task state
Crash and restart recovery rebuilds lagging caches and projections from authoritative shared state without manual repair
Multi-worktree dogfooding shows no false completion, stale publish acknowledgement, or shared-ref divergence under normal use
